images.alt:
🎶 OP 》„Madual ↔ Heart“ von Yume Miyamoto & Rumi Ōkubo
🎵 ED 》„Handmade“ von Shūgo Nakamura 

📜 Beschreibung 》
Melody ist die Wiedergeburt eines japanischen Mädchens und verfolgt in ihrer neuen Welt nur ein Ziel: die beste Maid der Welt zu werden. Als Allround-Maid arbeitet sie für eine verarmte Grafenfamilie im Königreich Theolas und bringt mit Fleiß, Können und starker Magie selbst ein heruntergekommenes Anwesen wieder auf Vordermann. Ob Putzen, Servieren, Jagen oder Heimwerken, Melody kann einfach alles. Was sie nicht weiß: Diese Welt ist eigentlich ein Otome-Game, und ausgerechnet sie ist die mächtige Heldin und Heilige der Geschichte.

»Lectias Froude« von Yūki Ono
Ein Leibritter im Dienst von Earl Reginverse. Er sucht nach der Tochter des Earls, Melody, und orientiert sich dabei an ihrem silbernen Haar und ihren lapisblauen Augen. Seit Kurzem geht ihm jedoch ein Dienstmädchen nicht mehr aus dem Kopf, dem er begegnet ist.

»Byūku« von Shun Horie
Ein geheimnisvoller junger Mann, der plötzlich auftaucht, um den Ball anzugreifen.

»Demon King« von Shūgo Nakamura
Der finale Boss aus dem Otome-Game »The Silver Saint and the Five Vows«. Er gilt als eine Existenz, die Unheil bringt und die Welt ins Verderben stürzt. Etwa zur gleichen Zeit, als die Heldin an der Akademie aufgenommen wird, beginnt sich sein Siegel zu lösen, woraufhin sich dort nach und nach seltsame Vorfälle ereignen.

record.text: A useful filter for evaluating "AI-powered" anything in hiring: ask what specific signal the model uses, and how it was trained. If the answer is "we use ChatGPT to summarise the job description" - that's not a tool, that's a wrapper. Worth saying out loud more often.

The clean version of "AI in hiring" was supposed to be: better matching, less filtering noise, fewer rejected qualified candidates. The actual version is: more applications, more filters, same recruiters, more burnout. The technology landed on the wrong side of the funnel.

A 2024 meta-analysis of 38 longitudinal studies found unemployment is associated with roughly twice the risk of mental health problems. Re-employment reduces that risk by about a third. The wellbeing effect of getting hired isn't soft. It's measurable. (PMC, 2024)

One man, whose now-ex wife believes that she discovered powerful spiritual entities inside of ChatGPT, described connecting with another man who was also losing his wife to a ChatGPT-generated spiritual world. To their horror, the pair quickly realized that their spouses — and marriages — started unraveling in the wake of the April memory update.

“We actually had a phone call… we just talked and realized the commonalities,” the man told us. When he mentioned the date of April memory update, he explained, the other husband “was like, ‘Oh my God, that aligns perfectly.'”

In conversations with Futurism, people who’ve experienced AI spirals have described their experience of the April memory update as nothing short of magical — the AI, they shared, suddenly felt more like a close friend or confidante that really knew them. Many have described feeling deeply seen, in some cases for the first time in their lives. In short, the hyper-personalization that memory offered translated into something powerful: intimacy. And looking back on their experiences, some of those who have recovered from their ChatGPT-linked crises feel as though that intimacy had a “manipulative” effect.

images.alt:
We have updated our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Notice

AI Features on Linktree
An overview of Linktree's AI features

How AI features work
AI features on Linktree generate results (called Output) based on information provided to the system (called Input).

Input may include things like:

Text prompts you enter e.g. asking questions within our Insight Chats feature.

Content you upload or add to your Linktree like images or videos e.g. uploading a profile image and using our Restyle AI feature.

Information available on the Linktree platform and from your profile including your links e.g. AI generated link titles or AI generated bios.

Links you submit to create your Linktree.

Information provided by third-party services e.g. authenticating with Instagram so that we can analyse your social media data and provide you with social analytics.

The AI system uses this Input to generate Output, which may include text, images, analytics and profile insights or recommendations depending on the feature.

https://linktr.ee/help/en/articles/9269822-ai-features-on-linktree?lid=g3hnv8kr9765

Which AI model does Linktree use and why? What is Linktree doing to keep Linkers, visitors, and creators safe?
Linktree uses DALL-E 3, provided by OpenAI, to create brand-new custom avatar or thumbnail images.

 

With Linkers and visitors’ safety as a priority, Linktree performs its own reviews of AI-generated content on the platform to ensure compliance with our Community Standards and ethical AI practices. OpenAI’s commitment to safety and transparency aligns with Linktree’s values and Trust & Safety efforts.

 

For example:

OpenAI’s policies explicitly forbid usage that might result in harm to oneself or others, e.g. “to defraud, scam, spam, mislead, bully, harass, defame, discriminate based on protected attributes, sexualize children, or promote violence, hatred or the suffering of others.”

OpenAI utilizes safeguards that prevent the generation of “violent, adult, or hateful content.”

OpenAI/DALL-E 3 “has mitigations to decline requests that ask for a public figure by name” and is “designed to decline requests that ask for an image in the style of a living artist.”

external.description: Ofis yazılım paketleri söz konusu olduğunda akıllara oldukça uzun bir zamandır Microsoft'un ofis yazılım paketi Microsoft 365 geliyor. Elbette ki LibreOffice gibi alternatifler yayınlandı fakat Word, Excel ve PowerPoint gibi programları geçebilen henüz bir paket olmadı. GitHub Copilot bascule vers une tarification “au token” et provoque une vague de critiques chez les développeurs

La plateforme d’assistance au code de GitHub, GitHub Copilot, est au cœur d’une controverse après l’annonce d’un changement majeur de son modèle économique. À partir du 1er juin 2026,…

external.description: La plateforme d’assistance au code de GitHub, GitHub Copilot, est au cœur d’une controverse après l’annonce d’un changement majeur de son modèle économique. À partir du 1er juin 2026, le service abandonne la tarification forfaitaire mensuelle au profit d’une facturation basée sur la consommation de tokens, une unité correspondant à l’usage réel des modèles d’IA. Selon les informations rapportées par le média spécialisé Techcrunch, cette transition pourrait entraîner une forte hausse des coûts pour certains utilisateurs, en particulier les indépendants et petites équipes. Plusieurs développeurs ont exprimé leur mécontentement sur Reddit et X, évoquant des factures multipliées par dix, voire davantage dans certains cas extrêmes…
external.title: GitHub Copilot bascule vers une tarification “au token” et provoque une vague de critiques chez les développeurs

external.description: Google a publié un billet de blog vendredi dernier dans lequel il revient sur les démonstrations de ses nouveaux modèles d’intelligence artificielle, Gemini Omni et Gemini 3.5 Flash, présentés quelques jours plus tôt lors de la conférence Google I/O 2026. Selon Google, ces deux modèles incarnent une nouvelle étape dans l’évolution de ses systèmes d’IA. Gemini Omni est conçu pour traiter des contenus multimodaux (texte, image, audio et vidéo) et permet notamment l’édition de vidéos en langage naturel. Gemini 3.5 Flash, de son côté, est orienté vers des tâches complexes dites « agentiques », capables d’exécuter des processus en plusieurs étapes et d’automatiser certains flux de travail.
external.title: IA : Google revient sur Gemini Omni et Gemini 3.5 Flash présentés au Google I/O 2026

Meta travaillerait sur un pendentif connecté alimenté par l’intelligence artificielle et prévoit de lancer des tests au cours de l’année prochaine, selon des informations rapportées par le…

external.description: Meta travaillerait sur un pendentif connecté alimenté par l’intelligence artificielle et prévoit de lancer des tests au cours de l’année prochaine, selon des informations rapportées par le média spécialisé TechCrunch, citant une note interne consultée par The Information. Ce projet s’inscrirait dans la continuité du rachat, fin 2025, de la startup Limitless, spécialisée dans les dispositifs d’IA portables. L’entreprise avait développé un pendentif capable d’enregistrer les conversations de son utilisateur lorsqu’il est porté autour du cou ou fixé sur un vêtement. À l’époque de cette acquisition, Meta avait indiqué vouloir accélérer ses travaux dans le domaine des objets connectés intégrant l’intelligence artificielle.
external.title: Meta préparerait un pendentif intelligent dopé à l’IA pour concurrencer les nouveaux appareils connectés

record.text: It's all rather "Schroedinger's Productivity" isn't it. My (multinational) employer is pushing Copilot, and I have asked how they're actually tracking supposed productivity gains, but no response. Also asked how / if they were considering AI use in Scope 3 emissions reporting, but again...

Always loved being able to take a jumbled starting point, discern the various inputs and outputs and bring order to the chaos. Brain just seems to be wired in a way that a) finds that all deeply satisfying and b) is pretty damn good at it.

Last few weeks at work have been very much about controls, memos and procedures. All in Word. Part of the job, but a bit "box ticky" and don't enjoy it. Today however has been full on reconciliation of a multi-tentacled thing, therefore Excel. Very much my happy place and a nice way to end the week.

Earlier this week, one of my colleague civil engineers answered the question, "Does Hypalon contain 6PPD?". This was outside is body of knowledge yet he answered "No" with confidence because it's what an LLM tool (probably Copilot) said.
It's the first time that's happened in my career as a civil engineer.

external.description: Following Google's integration of AI into search results, DuckDuckGo, a privacy-focused alternative, experienced a surge in user adoption.  App installs for DuckDuckGo in the U.S. increased significantly, with an 18.1% week-over-week average during late May.  This growth was particularly pronounced on iOS, reaching a 33% average increase.  DuckDuckGo's "noai" search page, which excludes AI-generated content, also saw substantial growth in traffic.  The increased interest in DuckDuckGo is attributed to user dissatisfaction with Google's shift towards AI-driven search results.  Users expressed concerns about the potential for inaccurate information, and loss of control.  One user mentioned they were switching because they could opt out of AI.  Google has responded stating that AI mode isn't the default in their search results.  DuckDuckGo further offers a separate tool, Duck.ai, providing access to various AI models while prioritizing user privacy. This tool deletes conversations within 30 days and strips the user's IP before use.
external.title: DuckDuckGo Installs Up 30% After Google Announced AI Search

record.text:
ヨーロッパの人、本場フランス人も「日本のパンの方が美味い」などの意見が多く

で、それを聞いた日本人は鼻が高いわけですが…ｗ
ほとんどの人は外国の事情を知らないので
本当のところはよく分かっていないｗ

ちなみに私も？…とはなりますｗ
私なりの見解を言いますと…

「食パン」英語で「White bread」ですが
日本の食パンのことを「Japanese milk bread」と言います
つまり、別物ということｗ

以前、「アメリカで日本の食パンを再現する方法」という記事を見た覚えがあるんですが…
ポイントを挙げると

1、日本から小麦粉を逆輸入（現在は日系スーパーにあるらしい）
日本の小麦の約90％が輸入で、内50％が最高グレードのアメリカ産
輸出によってアメリカ国内に最高グレードの小麦がないｗ
2、湯種製法
小麦の約4分の1を熱湯（65℃）で糊化
3，牛乳を入れる
4，軟水のペットボトル水を使う
日本の水道水は硬度約50の軟水
他の国は硬度200前後の硬水（カルシウム・マグネシウム）が多い

同様に作った場合の軟水・硬水の違い
軟水：しっとり柔らかいが味が薄くなる
硬水：歯ごたえがよく味が濃い

つまり
日本ではパンを固く作るのが難しいので
しっとり柔らかく作る方向性で発展した
日本のパンは他国と別物ｗ

Like if you get a vuln report and you use Claude or whatever to look into it while you *also* look into it? スーパーファミコン用ソフト「フィッシング甲子園」は
1996年05月31日にキングレコードより発売されました。
AI曰く、このゲームは…
バスフィッシングを題材にした、プレイヤーが高校生となって甲子園を目指すというユニークな設定のスポーツゲームです。全国の湖や川を舞台に、釣り上げて得られるポイントで全国大会優勝を目指します。多彩なルアーを選択し、場所や時間帯によって変化する魚の反応を見極める戦略性が魅力です。コミカルな演出と、本格的なフィッシング要素が見事に融合した作品として、当時多くの釣り好きプレイヤーに親しまれました。
(実際の内容とは異なる可能性があります)

ゲームボーイカラー専用ソフト「大貝獣物語 ポヨンのダンジョンルーム2」は
2000年06月02日にハドソンより発売されました。
AI曰く、このゲームは…
前作を継承した、不思議のダンジョン形式のローグライク。主人公ポヨンを操作し、ランダム生成される迷宮の最深部を目指します。コミカルな世界観に加え、モンスターを仲間にして育成する要素が特徴。携帯機の手軽さがありながら、限られたリソースで生き残る戦略性や試行錯誤が楽しめます。初心者から熟練者まで、誰もが手軽にダンジョン攻略の醍醐味を味わえる一作です。
(実際の内容とは異なる可能性があります)

ファミコン用ソフト「ドラゴンクエスト」は
1986年05月27日にエニックスより発売されました。
AI曰く、このゲームは…
日本の家庭用ゲームRPGの金字塔です。勇者の血を引く主人公が、竜王にさらわれた姫を救い世界に平和を取り戻すため冒険します。コマンド選択式という直感的な操作を確立し、物語を進める楽しさを広く浸透させました。セーブが困難な時代に「復活の呪文」で再開できる仕組みを導入した点も画期的です。今なお続く国民的シリーズの原点として、多くのファンの記憶に刻まれている歴史的名作です。
(実際の内容とは異なる可能性があります)

record.text: If I look on my Microsoft campus dashboard, nearly every product has a co-pilot button, some have multiple. Grammarly, etc have it built in. It's definitely avoidable but I can see how it could be hard, and enticing.

I feel for students in a lot of ways with this. They see peers and faculty using AI (sure nto everyone but plenty), VC's bragging about how much AI compute their schools are involved in, people getting insanely rich off it, and that they need to know how to use it.

Its interesting. I bought it relatively recently after temporarily losing access to Starfield. The story isn't very deep, it's not an RPG but more exploration/survival. I reload it every new update and play through, someday i'll finish the last bit of story. They've def had some fun updates.

Why cancer spreads more in middle age than in old age
->ScienceDaily | More on "Cancer spread peaks in middle age" at BigEarthData.ai

external.description: That gap may help explain why many cancer therapies that perform well in laboratory studies ultimately fail in human clinical trials. New findings from Fox Chase Cancer Center, presented at the American Association for Cancer Research annual meeting, suggest that melanoma does not behave the same way throughout the aging process. Researchers found that cancer spread was lowest in young mice, reached its highest level in middle aged mice, and then declined again in very old mice. "The vast majority of studies are done in these very young mice that have a healthy and intact immune system," said Mitchell Fane, PhD, a cancer biologist who specializes in aging and cancer, and lead investigator of the study. "Right now, it's easy to personalize care for someone who's young and fit, who's potentially not going to experience as many toxicities; understanding how therapies affect older patients would give us more and better treatment options." Immune Cells May Hold the Key The researchers believe a specialized group of immune cells known as gamma delta (γδ) T cells may help explain the surprising pattern. These cells act as an early defense system, helping prevent cancer from spreading throughout the body. Young mice and very...
external.title: Why cancer spreads more in middle age than in old age

Russia Can No Longer Take More Land Than Ukraine Liberates, Zelenskyy Says
->UNITED24 Media | More on "Zelenskyy Ukraine battlefield diplomacy window" at BigEarthData.ai | #StandWithUkraine #Land #RussiaUkraineWar #Zelenskyy

external.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said Russia began losing the battlefield initiative in December 2025 and argued that Ukraine and its partners now have a window to push for diplomacy before next winter, while keeping strong sanctions pressure on Moscow. Speaking in an interview with Face the Nation on May 31, Zelenskyy said Russia’s monthly losses are growing and that Moscow can no longer seize more territory than Ukrainian forces can liberate. “Beginning in December 2025, Russia started to lose the initiative on the battlefield. In January 2026, I told our American partners: ‘I think there is a window for negotiations, because each month Russia will be losing more and more troops.’ Now they can’t occupy more territory in a month than we liberate,” Zelenskyy said. The Ukrainian President said that creates a need to search for a diplomatic path before winter, but only if pressure on Russia continues from both inside the country and from Ukraine’s Western partners. “Therefore, I think that we need to find a diplomatic way – to sit down and talk – before next winter. But this depends on internal pressure on Putin from his society as well as American and European sanctions pressure on Russia,”...
external.title: Russia Can No Longer Take More Land Than Ukraine Liberates, Zelenskyy Says
